_comment: Corner-case scenario for parser and runtime behavior checks. Note: JSON comments are represented via _comment fields.

simulation_parameters._comment: Short horizon for manageable logs while still triggering multiple 5s/10s/20s tasks.

satellite_initial_state._comment: Nominal LEO-like orbital rate used as baseline.

corner_case_notes.debris_102: vt=0 corner case (no tangential theta update).
corner_case_notes.debris_103: Large size object to stress size-scaled thresholds.
corner_case_notes.debris_104: Negative theta input and very small size.
corner_case_notes.debris_105: Same radius as satellite (dr=0 at start).
corner_case_notes.debris_106: Near-aligned and close radius for potential high-risk transitions.

debris_catalog._comment: Large debris size_cm=250 tests loose thresholds.
Negative theta and tiny size corner.
dr starts at zero; classification relies on angular term.
Near radius/theta alignment to trigger high-risk behavior.
